summary: Iteration 11 testing complete - Enhanced onboarding flow with 6 steps fully verified. All features working: Welcome, Your Look (avatar picker), Stay Connected (phone/SMS/push), Your First Table, Invite People, All Set summary. Portal shows reminder banner for incomplete items. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding.jsx correctly implements 6-step flow with progress bar
All steps have 'Complete later' button that allows skipping
Step 1 'Complete later' calls skipAll() which sets onboarded=true and all completion flags to false
Step 6 shows checklist with green checkmarks for completed items
Portal.jsx SetupReminder component reads localStorage 'rt-onboard-completed' to determine missing items
Reminder banner correctly shows only missing items (avatar, phone, push, table)
Reminder banner has dismiss button that works correctly
Table creation during onboarding works and table appears in sidebar
Invite code generation works with copy button and Text/Email share options
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during onboarding flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 complete. Enhanced onboarding flow verified: 6 steps (Welcome, Your Look, Stay Connected, Your First Table, Invite People, All Set). All steps skippable with 'Complete later'. Portal shows SetupReminder banner for incomplete items (avatar, phone, push, table). Banner is dismissible. localStorage key 'rt-onboard-completed' stores completion status as JSON. New users have onboarded=false, which triggers redirect to /welcome. After onboarding, onboarded=true is set via PUT /api/me.
